tech_news.description: Anthropic’s latest research reveals how Claude reasons internally, but it offers no evidence that AI has the kind of consciousness or experience that make us human.

tech_news.description: WhatCable is an free Mac app, for Macs with M1 or later chips, that can test your USB-C cables and connections.

tech_news.description: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced players on PC were shocked to find that a Ubisoft Connect outage has locked them out of playing the game.
